verses.book: The Commentary and Homilies of St. John Chrysostom on Galatians and Ephesians.
verses.text: St. Chrysostom’s Commentary on the Epistle to the Galatians is continuous, according to chapter and verse, instead of being arranged in Homilies, with a moral or practical application at their close, as in his exposition of other Epistles.

verses.book: The Commentary and Homilies of St. John Chrysostom on Galatians and Ephesians.

verses.text: The Homilies on the Epistle to the Ephesians have been by some critics assigned to the Episcopate at Constantinople, in consequence of certain imperfections in their composition, which seemed to argue absence of the comparative leisure which he enjoyed at Antioch.
